home.title: Home
home.description: Vest Visuals is a professional photography and videography studio specializing in weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and marketing content. We deliver high-quality images and video tailored to your needs, with reliable service and fast turnaround for clients across the region.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Vest Visuals to discuss your photography or videography project. We cover weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and marketing shoots. Request a quote, ask a question, or book your session, we typically reply within one business day.
contact.og-subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll handle the rest

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.description: Read the Vest Visuals privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal data. Learn what information we gather when you contact us or book a photography or videography session, and the rights you have over your data.
privacy-policy.og-subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data

cookie-policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie-policy.description: Learn how Vest Visuals uses cookies and similar technologies on our website. This cookie policy explains which cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can manage or disable them in your browser at any time.
cookie-policy.og-subtitle: What we use and how to manage them

terms-of-service.title: Terms of Service
terms-of-service.description: Review the Vest Visuals terms of service before using our website or booking our photography and videography services. These terms cover bookings, payments, usage rights, and the conditions that apply when you work with us.
terms-of-service.og-subtitle: Bookings, payments, and usage rights explained

locations-timisoara.title: Photography & Videography in Timișoara
locations-timisoara.description: Vest Visuals offers professional photography and videography in Timișoara for weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. Local knowledge, a personal approach, and high-quality results for every project in the city and beyond.

locations-arad.title: Photography & Videography in Arad
locations-arad.description: Vest Visuals brings professional photography and videography to Arad for weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. A personal approach and high-quality results for every project across the city and its surroundings.

locations-oradea.title: Photography & Videography in Oradea
locations-oradea.description: Vest Visuals offers professional photography and videography in Oradea for weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. A personal approach and high-quality results for every project in the city and the wider region.

locations-drobeta-turnu-severin.title: Photography & Videography in Drobeta-Turnu Severin
locations-drobeta-turnu-severin.description: Vest Visuals offers professional photography and videography in Drobeta-Turnu Severin for weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. A personal approach and high-quality results for every project in the area.

locations-cluj-napoca.title: Photography & Videography in Cluj-Napoca
locations-cluj-napoca.description: Vest Visuals brings professional photography and videography to Cluj-Napoca for weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. A personal approach and high-quality results for every project across the city and region.

locations-bucuresti.title: Photography & Videography in Bucharest
locations-bucuresti.description: Vest Visuals offers professional photography and videography in Bucharest for weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. A personal approach and high-quality results for every project across the capital.

services-18th-birthday.title: 18th Birthday Photography & Videography
services-18th-birthday.description: Vest Visuals captures 18th birthday parties with professional photography and videography. From the big entrance to the last dance, we document every moment so you can relive the night exactly as it felt, with photos and films made to last.
services-18th-birthday.og-subtitle: Photography & videography for your big night

services-wedding.title: Wedding Photography & Videography
services-wedding.description: Vest Visuals offers professional wedding photography and videography for your big day. We capture every emotion, detail, and celebration with a natural, personal approach, delivering timeless photos and cinematic films you'll treasure for years.

services-christening.title: Christening Photography & Videography
services-christening.description: Vest Visuals captures christenings with warm, natural photography and videography. From the ceremony to the celebration, we document this special day with care, so you keep the memories of your little one's first big moment forever.
services-christening.og-subtitle: Gentle photography & video for your christening

services-outdoor.title: Outdoor Portrait Photography
services-outdoor.description: Vest Visuals creates natural outdoor portrait sessions for individuals, couples, and families. Shot in beautiful natural light, our relaxed approach brings out genuine expressions and delivers portraits you'll actually love looking at.

services-real-estate.title: Real Estate Photography & Videography
services-real-estate.description: Vest Visuals offers professional real estate photography and videography that helps properties sell faster. We showcase every space at its best with sharp images and smooth video tours that draw buyers in and make listings stand out.
services-real-estate.og-subtitle: Photography & video that draws buyers in

services-automotive.title: Automotive Photography & Videography
services-automotive.description: Vest Visuals shoots cars the way they deserve, with professional automotive photography and videography. From static detail shots to dynamic rolling footage, we make every vehicle look its absolute best, ready for ads, dealers, or your collection.
services-automotive.og-title: Cars that look like the ad

services-marketing.title: Marketing Content for Businesses
services-marketing.description: Vest Visuals creates cinematic commercial content for businesses, from product and brand photography to promotional video. We help your business stand out with professional visuals built to sell and made to fit how you market.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Browse the Vest Visuals portfolio of photography and videography work, from weddings and events to portraits, automotive, real estate, and business content. See our style, quality, and attention to detail across a range of recent projects.

login.title: Log In
login.description: Log in to your Vest Visuals account to access your galleries, manage your bookings, and view your photos and videos. Enter your details to securely sign in and pick up right where you left off.
login.og-subtitle: Sign in to access your galleries

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Create a Vest Visuals account to access your private galleries, manage your bookings, and download your photos and videos. Sign up in a few steps and keep everything from your shoot in one place.
register.og-subtitle: Create your account to get started

albums.title: Your Albums
albums.description: View and download the photos and videos from your Vest Visuals shoot. Browse your private album, relive every moment from your session, and save your favorite shots, all in one place, whenever you're ready.
albums.og-subtitle: View and download your photos and videos

u.title: Dashboard
u.description: Your Vest Visuals dashboard. Access your galleries, manage your bookings, and view or download your photos and videos, all in one place.
u.og-subtitle: Galleries, bookings, and downloads in one place

a.title: Admin Dashboard
a.description: The Vest Visuals admin dashboard. Manage bookings, galleries, clients, and content from a single place.

hero.title: The moments that <accent>matter,</accent> captured <accent2>right.</accent2>
hero.description: Weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and brand work, shot and edited by a studio that actually cares how it turns out. Wherever your story takes place, we're there for it.

about.title: Small studio, <accent>full attention.</accent>
about.description: We started Vest Visuals because we love this work and we're picky about how it's done. From the first message to the final gallery, you're talking to the people actually behind the camera and the edit. We take on projects we can give our full attention to, so nothing about your shoot feels rushed or generic.
about.description-1: Has a rare eye for light and for the moments that won't happen twice.
about.description-2: Gives rhythm, sound, and emotion to what would otherwise be just clips.

portfolio.title: See it <accent>for yourself.</accent>
portfolio.description: A handful of recent projects we're proud of. Quality over quantity, every time.

automotive.name: <accent>Automotive</accent>
automotive.description: Cars that look like the ad

before-and-after.title: Same frame. <accent>Whole new feeling.</accent>
before-and-after.description: Good editing is the part nobody talks about and everybody notices. Pull the slider and watch a raw shot turn into the final look, all in the color, contrast, and mood.

locations.title: Wherever the <accent>shoot takes us.</accent>
locations.description: A good project is worth the drive. We pack the gear and show up wherever you need us, near or far.

other.name: Somewhere else?
other.description: We travel across the country for the right shoot

contact.title: Got something in mind? <accent>Let's talk.</accent>
contact.description: Send us a few details about what you need and you'll hear back within one business day.

home.title: Custom Software, Web & Cloud Development
home.description: Vest Visuals is a custom software development company building web and mobile apps, business intelligence dashboards, workflow automation, cloud & DevOps infrastructure, and data engineering pipelines, with technical consulting and long-term support for businesses worldwide.
home.og-subtitle: Web & mobile apps, automation, cloud, data, and consulting from one experienced team

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Vest Visuals for custom software development, web and mobile apps, workflow automation, cloud & DevOps, or data engineering. Book a free 30-45 minute discovery call, get honest feedback and a clear technical plan, with a reply within one business day.
contact.og-subtitle: Free discovery call, honest feedback, and a clear technical plan within a week

hero.title: Software solutions built for long-term success
hero.description: We build custom software tailored to how your organization actually works, improving performance and cutting wasted effort. We take time to understand your business before writing a line of code, and we stay involved with expert guidance at every step. We don't just ship software, we help you make it succeed.

services.title: What we do
services.description: Every service, from web development to cloud and data, is handled by specialists with years of experience in that exact field. That's how we keep quality high across very different kinds of work.
services.s1-d: From landing pages and e-commerce stores to complex enterprise web platforms. Clean design, flawless functionality, full responsiveness, and SEO done properly from day one.
services.s2-d: We turn your concept into a mobile app people actually enjoy using. Intuitive functionality, polished visuals, and a user experience your customers will come back to, on both iOS and Android.
services.s3-d: Migrate, scale, or optimize your platforms with our cloud specialists. Faster infrastructure, smooth deployments, and systems built to stay reliable as you grow.
services.s4-d: We take time to understand your business so the numbers mean something. Dashboards, reporting, and data visualization that answer real questions, not random reports.
services.s5-d: We map your workflows and automate the repetitive parts. From emails and reports to entire business processes and data pipelines running on their own.
services.s6-d: Stop worrying about your data, no matter how big it gets. We build and run the full pipeline: collection from any source, ETL, databases, data warehousing, automated flows, and reporting.
services.s7-d: Sometimes you need a plan more than extra hands. We advise on software architecture and codebases, and help your team decide what's worth building. Ideal if you already have developers.
services.s8-d: Long-term software support and maintenance that keeps your systems fast, secure, and reliable, so what we build keeps performing years after launch.

testimonials.title: The work speaks, but they did too.
testimonials.description: A few words from the businesses we've built software for.

faq.title: Most common questions
faq.description: Anything else on your mind? Write to us at <email>contact@vestvisuals.ro</email> and we'll answer plainly.
faq.a1: Most software development projects start within a week of the discovery call. If you have a web app, mobile app, or automation project in mind, reach out and we'll find a slot.
faq.q2: How do you work with an existing team?
faq.a2: That's most of our experience. Our developers integrate with your crew and work as one bigger team, not two separate groups passing tickets around.
faq.a3: Timișoara, Romania, working remotely with software clients both local and international.
faq.q4: How much does the discovery call cost?
faq.a4: Nothing. Book a 30-45 minute call, we'll give you honest feedback on your software project and a clear technical plan, with no obligation to move forward.
faq.q5: What do you need from us to start?
faq.a5: A clear description of what you need and what you want to achieve. The more detail you give us, the better the development plan we come back with.
faq.a6: Sometimes, depending on the project. In most cases, billing per completed development stage has worked best for both us and our clients.

contact.title: Tell us what you're building
contact.description: Head to the contact page, describe your software project, and we'll review it and get back to you as soon as possible, usually within one business day.

cookie-consent.title: Cookies
cookie-consent.description: This site uses cookies to give you a better browsing experience. Learn more about <link>how we use cookies and how you can change your settings.</link>
